title: [DNM] Test ocicrypt upgrade
body:
Testing downstream users of ocicrypt library regression before release.

Signed-off-by: Brandon Lum <lumjjb@gmail.com>

comments.body: @lumjjb What is going on with this one?

Hi @rhatdan we were resolving some build issues with the skopeo/buildah cross builder. One of the components needed to be special case based on whether cgo was being used or not. We have resolved this, so am closing this - and will close the other ones as well!
